Physics

  • Physics Reference
  • Physics: Equations
  • $$ \frac{n_{z+1}, n_e}{n_z}
  • $$ \varepsilon_{ki}(\lambda)
  • $$ \gamma_{\text{Stark}}(n_e, T)
  • $$ V(\lambda; \sigma, \gamma)
  • $$ I_{\text{measured}}(\lambda)
  • $$ I_{ki}
  • $$ \underbrace{\ln!\left(\frac{I_{ki}, \lambda_{ki}}{g_k, A_{ki}}\right)}_{y}
  • $$ S(T, n_e)
  • $$ C_{s\text{-oxide}}
  • $$ \tau_0
  • \frac{\pi e^2}{m_e c}, f_{ki}, n_i, L, \frac{1}{\Delta\nu_D}, \qquad \frac{I_{\text{obs}}}{I_{\text{thin}}}
  • $$ \ln p(\mathbf{I}_{\text{obs}} \mid T, n_e, \mathbf{C})
  • Physics: Assumptions and Validity

CF-LIBS
  • Changelog 2026-02-04_091812
  • View page source

Changelog 2026-02-04_091812

Generated by workspace automation on 2026-02-04.

Summary

  • Added CF-LIBS classic inversion CLI, docs, and example config

  • Added benchmark and inversion modules with corresponding tests

  • Added Scipp-to-CF-LIBS pipeline example script

  • Added repository .claude workflow/tooling files

  • Updated dependencies and ignore rules

Added Files

  • .claude/agents/architect.md

  • .claude/agents/code-reviewer.md

  • .claude/agents/detective.md

  • .claude/agents/discovery.md

  • .claude/agents/infra-supervisor.md

  • .claude/agents/merge-supervisor.md

  • .claude/agents/python-supervisor.md

  • .claude/agents/research-agent.md

  • .claude/agents/scout.md

  • .claude/agents/scribe.md

  • .claude/agents/validation-agent.md

  • .claude/frontend-reviews-requirement.md
